intro-img-2b8c1d.query: The microscope is a portal. Through it, the ordinary becomes extraordinary — a fleck of dust turns into a cathedral, a puddle becomes an ocean teeming with life. MicroCosmos is a visual expedition through this unseen realm, where every frame rewrites what we thought we knew about scale, beauty and survival. A whole cosmos, smaller than a grain of sand
